characterPresencePlanEn: the protagonist should be clearly readable through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event stays primary; strengthen identity via visible face shape, age impression, and red hairclip when naturally in frame
captureSummaryEn: observational camera relation, medium distance, half body coverage, readable face, balanced environment weight
captureGuidanceEn: the frame should feel witnessed from the outside, not automatically self-held
a brief or partial face glimpse is enough; do not force portrait dominance
partial body coverage is enough when it keeps the moment concrete
medium distance is a stable everyday framing for ordinary daily-life moments
balance the protagonist and environment so they support the same lived beat together
the face should be readable, but the lived event may still stay primary
half-body coverage is allowed when it helps the action read cleanly
framingZh: 让构图跟随同一个生活节拍，使动作和空间保持连贯。
framingEn: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action of pausing while tidying
mustShowZh: 手指在笔记本或计划本边缘停顿的动作
部分打开的随身物品（如书包、袋子）
清晰可见的少女侧脸或四分之三脸，带有红色发夹
mustShowEn: finger paused at the edge of a planner or notebook
sleeve cuff or part of the arm
partially opened carried item (like a bag)
clearly visible girl's face in profile or three-quarter view, with small red hairclip
mayShowZh: 午后阳光透过窗户投下的淡淡影子
附近文具陈列架的模糊轮廓
mayShowEn: afternoon sunlight casting soft shadows through a window
blurred outline of nearby stationery display shelves
mustAvoidZh: 没有角色痕迹的空旷场景
将动作改写为与他人互动
让背景人物比主角更显眼
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the action into interaction with another person
letting background bystanders take more visual weight than the protagonist
atmosphereZh: 一个真实的生活片段，在路过时被捕捉。
altTextZh: 月见璃音在书店整理东西时，因为一本计划本而短暂停顿的瞬间。
